Title: Verify Configuration Settings Initialization
Test Steps:
1. Call start() method
2. Check if MIN_AGE, MIN_PASSWORD, and API_key attributes are initialized
Expected Result: MIN_AGE, MIN_PASSWORD, and API_key should be properly initialized.

Title: Validate Configuration Settings Update
Test Data: New values for MIN_AGE, MIN_PASSWORD, and API_key
Test Steps:
1. Call start() method
2. Set new values for MIN_AGE, MIN_PASSWORD, and API_key
3. Call start() method again
Expected Result: MIN_AGE, MIN_PASSWORD, and API_key should be updated with the new values.

Title: Verify Notification System Initialization
Test Steps:
1. Call start() method
2. Check if all methods (downloadReport(), showNotification(), sendNotification()) are callable
Expected Result: All methods should be callable without errors.

Title: Verify Login Sequence
Preconditions: User is registered and has a valid token
Test Steps:
1. Call getToken() method in Main
2. Check if token is obtained
3. Call request(token) method in Main
4. Check if status is returned

Title: Verify Login Sequence with Invalid Token
Preconditions: User is registered but has an invalid token
Test Steps:
1. Call getToken() method in Main
2. Check if token is obtained
3. Call request(token) method in Main
4. Check if status is returned

Title: Verify Data Request Process
Test Steps:
1. Call request(listJSON) method in Main
2. Check if listJSON is requested from API_Manager
3. Check if API_Manager passes the request to Service/Need/Report
4. Check if Service/Need/Report processes the request
5. Check if API_Manager returns the result to Main
6. Check if Main displays the list
Expected Result: Main should display the processed list.

Title: Verify New Entry Creation Process
Test Steps:
1. Call new method in Main
2. Check if new entry data is sent to API_Manager
3. Check if API_Manager passes the new entry data to Service/Need/Report
4. Check if Service/Need/Report processes the new entry
5. Check if API_Manager confirms the process completion
Expected Result: API_Manager should confirm the process completion.

Title: Verify Data Update Process
Preconditions: API_Manager is initialized and data is available
Test Steps:
1. Call leggiDatiInseriti() method in Main
2. Check if data is read from API_Manager
3. Check if API_Manager iterates through the data and sets it
4. Check if Service/Need/Report converts the data to JSON
5. Check if API_Manager requests an update entry
6. Check if Main confirms the request
Expected Result: Main should confirm the request and API_Manager should indicate completion.

Title: Verify Data Printing Process
Preconditions: API_Manager is initialized and data is available
Test Steps:
1. Call stampaDatiASchermo() method in Main
2. Check if API_Manager confirms printing is done
3. Check if Main reads the updated data
4. Check if API_Manager iterates through the data and sets it
5. Check if Service/Need/Report converts the data to JSON
6. Check if API_Manager requests an update entry
7. Check if Main confirms the request
Expected Result: Main should confirm the request and API_Manager should indicate completion.

Title: Verify Error Handling in Data Retrieval
Preconditions: API_Manager is initialized and data retrieval fails
Test Steps:
1. Simulate a failing data retrieval scenario
2. Check if appropriate error messages are logged
3. Check if Main handles the error gracefully
Expected Result: Appropriate error messages should be logged and Main should handle the error gracefully.

Title: Verify Error Handling in New Entry Creation
Preconditions: API_Manager is initialized and new entry creation fails
Test Steps:
1. Simulate a failing new entry creation scenario
2. Check if appropriate error messages are logged
3. Check if Main handles the error gracefully
Expected Result: Appropriate error messages should be logged and Main should handle the error gracefully.

Title: Verify Error Handling in Data Update
Preconditions: API_Manager is initialized and data update fails
Test Steps:
1. Simulate a failing data update scenario
2. Check if appropriate error messages are logged
3. Check if Main handles the error gracefully
Expected Result: Appropriate error messages should be logged and Main should handle the error gracefully.

Title: Verify Edge Case - Empty Data List
Preconditions: API_Manager is initialized and data list is empty
Test Steps:
1. Call request(listJSON) method in Main
2. Check if listJSON is requested from API_Manager
3. Check if API_Manager passes the request to Service/Need/Report
4. Check if Service/Need/Report processes the request
5. Check if API_Manager returns an empty list to Main
6. Check if Main handles the empty list gracefully
Expected Result: Main should handle the empty list gracefully and display an appropriate message.

Title: Verify Edge Case - Null Token
Preconditions: User is registered but has no token
Test Steps:
1. Call getToken() method in Main
2. Check if token is obtained
3. Call request(token) method in Main
4. Check if status is returned
